title: Add native GrepTool with regex + context lines (parity with CC tools/GrepTool/GrepTool.ts)
description:
## Summary

OpenClaudia has no native grep tool; regex search is described only in the bash tool prompt. Claude Code has a dedicated GrepTool at `tools/GrepTool/GrepTool.ts` (577 lines) backed by ripgrep.

## CC Reference

- CC source: `tools/GrepTool/GrepTool.ts:1-577`
- Input: `pattern` (regex), optional `path`, `glob`, `output_mode` (content/files_with_matches/count), context flags (-A/-B/-C/context), case-insensitive flag (-i), `type` (file type filter), `head_limit`
- Output: matching lines with file paths and line numbers; uses ripgrep internally

## Gap

OC: missing — no `src/tools/file/grep.rs` or equivalent. Regex file content search requires invoking bash with grep/rg.

## Parent Spec Issue

Filed from issue #525 (Phase 1 spec: tools — file operations).
